courses.title: Introduction to Music Theory
courses.description: Learn the basics of music theory, including scales, chords, and rhythm.

courses.title: Guitar for Beginners
courses.description: Start playing the guitar with this beginner-friendly course covering open chords and basic strumming.

courses.title: Piano Masterclass
courses.description: Master the piano with advanced techniques, sight-reading, and classical repertoire.

courses.title: Vocal Training & Singing
courses.description: Develop your voice with breathing exercises, pitch control, and performance techniques.

courses.title: Music Production with Ableton Live
courses.description: Learn to produce professional tracks using Ableton Live, from beat-making to mixing.

courses.title: Songwriting & Composition
courses.description: Unlock your creative potential by learning melody, harmony, and lyric writing fundamentals.

courses.title: Drum Fundamentals
courses.description: Get behind the kit and learn essential rhythms, fills, and groove techniques.

courses.title: Bass Guitar Essentials
courses.description: Learn to lock in the groove with foundational bass lines, scales, and techniques.

courses.title: Music Mixing & Mastering
courses.description: Take your tracks from rough mix to polished master with professional-grade techniques.

courses.title: Jazz Improvisation
courses.description: Explore jazz harmony, scales, and improvisation concepts to express yourself freely.

courses.title: Violin for Beginners
courses.description: Learn to hold the bow, read sheet music, and play your first melodies on the violin.

courses.title: Electronic Music & Synthesis
courses.description: Dive into synthesizers, sound design, and electronic production techniques.

courses.title: Music for Film & Media
courses.description: Compose compelling scores for films, games, and media using orchestral and digital tools.

courses.title: Ukulele Quick Start
courses.description: Pick up the ukulele fast with easy chords, strumming patterns, and fun songs.

courses.title: Music Business & Marketing
courses.description: Learn how to release music, grow your audience, and navigate the modern music industry.

courses.title: Advanced Guitar Techniques
courses.description: Take your guitar playing to the next level with fingerpicking, tapping, and advanced theory.

courses.title: Choir & Ensemble Singing
courses.description: Blend your voice with others, learn harmony singing, and perform as part of an ensemble.

courses.title: Music Theory for Producers
courses.description: Apply music theory directly to your DAW workflow to create more emotional, structured tracks.

courses.title: Classical Piano for Intermediates
courses.description: Deepen your classical piano skills with études, sonatas, and refined technique.

courses.title: Beat Making for Hip-Hop
courses.description: Create hard-hitting hip-hop beats using drum machines, samples, and sequencers.
